homeContents.aboutText: SAI TECH is a leading precision CNC machining company specializing in high-quality components for automotive, aerospace, and industrial applications. With over 25 years of experience and state-of-the-art machinery, we deliver excellence in every part we manufacture. Our commitment to quality, precision, and customer satisfaction has made us a trusted partner for industries worldwide.

inspections.name: First Article Inspection
inspections.capability: Complete dimensional layout reports for new parts, samples, and PPAP submissions.

inspections.name: In-Process Inspection
inspections.capability: Stage-wise verification of critical features during turning, milling, and grinding.

inspections.name: Final Inspection
inspections.capability: 100% dispatch approval checks for key dimensions with signed release records.

inspections.name: Surface Finish Validation
inspections.capability: Ra and Rz verification for precision sealing, sliding, and bearing surfaces.

inspections.name: Thread & Bore Verification
inspections.capability: Inspection for threaded, honed, and close-tolerance bore features.

inspections.name: Material Traceability Review
inspections.capability: Heat number tracking, hardness checks, and certification linkage for every batch.

products.name: Precision Shaft
products.description: High-tolerance shaft for automotive transmission systems. Manufactured from hardened steel with precise grinding.
products.specs: Material: EN24 Steel | Hardness: 58-62 HRC | Tolerance: +/-0.005mm | Surface Finish: Ra 0.4um
products.applications: Automotive transmissions, Industrial gearboxes, Precision machinery
products.qualityNote: Each shaft undergoes 100% inspection with CMM verification and material certification.

products.name: Aerospace Bracket
products.description: Lightweight aluminum bracket for aerospace applications. 5-axis CNC machined with tight tolerances.
products.specs: Material: 7075-T6 Aluminum | Weight: 245g | Tolerance: +/-0.01mm | Finish: Anodized
products.applications: Aircraft structural components, Satellite systems, Aerospace assemblies
products.qualityNote: AS9100D certified production with full traceability and material test reports.

products.name: Hydraulic Valve Body
products.description: Complex valve body with multiple internal passages. Precision bored and honed for hydraulic applications.
products.specs: Material: Ductile Iron | Pressure Rating: 350 bar | Surface Finish: Ra 0.8um internal
products.applications: Industrial hydraulics, Mobile equipment, Power transmission
products.qualityNote: Pressure tested to 1.5x working pressure with leak-free guarantee.

products.name: Gear Blank
products.description: Precision turned gear blank ready for hobbing. Consistent quality for high-volume production.
products.specs: Material: 20MnCr5 | OD Tolerance: +/-0.02mm | Bore Tolerance: H7 | Face Runout: 0.01mm
products.applications: Automotive gears, Industrial reducers, Power transmission
products.qualityNote: Statistical process control ensures consistent quality across production runs.

services.name: CNC Turning
services.description: High-precision turning operations for cylindrical parts with tolerances up to +/-0.005mm. We handle complex geometries and various materials including steel, aluminum, brass, and exotic alloys.

services.name: CNC Milling
services.description: Advanced 3, 4, and 5-axis milling capabilities for complex parts. Our state-of-the-art CNC mills handle intricate designs with exceptional accuracy and surface finish.

services.name: Surface Grinding
services.description: Precision surface grinding for flat surfaces with mirror finish quality. Achieve surface roughness as low as Ra 0.2um for critical applications.

services.name: Wire EDM
services.description: Electrical discharge machining for intricate cuts and hardened materials. Ideal for precision dies, molds, and complex internal features.

services.name: Quality Inspection
services.description: CMM inspection and quality assurance services ensuring every part meets exact specifications. Full dimensional reports and material certifications available.

services.name: Assembly Services
services.description: Complete sub-assembly and assembly services for machined components. Turnkey solutions from raw material to finished assembly.
